title: Chair Zumba
description: Seated music-based workout led by a Health Promotion Board instructor to improve strength, balance and flexibility. Suitable for seniors of all fitness levels.

title: Tai Chi Practice
description: Weekly Tai Chi sessions for seniors to improve balance, coordination and overall well-being through gentle flowing movements.

title: Digital Literacy Workshop
description: Hands-on smartphone and app usage workshop in a small group setting. Learn to use WhatsApp, WeChat and essential phone functions with volunteer classroom assistants.

title: Bingo & Cognitive Games
description: Weekly cognitive stimulation through Bingo, Sudoku and Rummy O games. A fun social activity that keeps the mind sharp while building friendships.

title: Acrylic Painting Class
description: Creative art session where seniors learn acrylic painting techniques. A relaxing and enriching activity that encourages self-expression and social bonding.

title: Stretch & Bend Exercise
description: Gentle stretching programme to improve flexibility, range of motion, blood flow and posture. Suitable for all fitness levels.

title: Karaoke Session
description: Social karaoke session featuring English, Mandarin, Malay and Hokkien songs. A lively activity for seniors to enjoy music and companionship.

title: HAPPY Exercise Programme
description: HPB-partnered cognitive wellness programme featuring 12 sessions of stretching, low-intensity body games, meditation and relaxation activities.

title: Flower Arrangement Workshop
description: National Silver Academy course on floral arrangement. Seniors learn creative flower arranging techniques in a hands-on workshop setting.

title: Digital Literacy Workshop
description: SilverSurfer digital literacy class where seniors learn smartphone basics, WhatsApp messaging and useful mobile applications with volunteer assistants.

title: Karaoke Session

title: Green Drumming

title: Tai Chi Exercise
description: Regular Tai Chi sessions for seniors to improve balance, coordination and overall well-being. Tai Chi is practised as both an exercise and rehabilitation activity at Metta.

description: Creative art and painting sessions for seniors to express themselves through visual arts. A relaxing activity that promotes well-being and social connection.

title: Community Health Screening
description: Regular health screening sessions including blood pressure monitoring, blood glucose checks and basic health assessments for seniors.

description: Structured exercise programme to improve balance and reduce fall risk among seniors. Includes guided movements and strength-building exercises.

title: Chair Yoga
description: Seated yoga class designed for seniors to improve flexibility, strength and relaxation through gentle poses adapted for chair-based practice.

title: Qigong Practice
description: Traditional Chinese breathing and movement exercise for overall wellness. Gentle, flowing movements promote relaxation and vitality in seniors.

title: Zentangle Art Workshop
description: Meditative structured pattern-drawing activity. Seniors create beautiful Zentangle art while enjoying a calming and focused creative session.

description: Regular health monitoring including blood pressure, heart rate and blood glucose checks. Seniors can track their health with professional support.

description: Nutrition-focused cooking session where seniors learn to prepare healthy meals. Covers meal planning, balanced diets and easy-to-follow recipes.

title: Group Exercise Class

title: Arts & Crafts Session
description: Creative arts and crafts workshop for seniors. Activities include paper crafting, decorative art and seasonal craft projects in a friendly group setting.
